productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Formal Black Shoes
description: This stylish pair in a square toe box design from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It’s a great combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These shoes give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for formal wear. You can team these with pants and dress shirts for a well groomed look.UpperLeather uppers for better comfort and durabilitySquare toe box for more comfortElasticated inserts on the sides for easy insertion and removal of the feetPadded collar for extra comfortLogo name tab embossed on the sideLeather lining for greater comfortMidsoleShock-absorbing EVA midsole for enhanced comfortCushioned footbed for all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistanceTerraced wave grooves and lugs on the periphery of the outsole for better gripWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
